# CWE-1125 positive: oversized public attack surface (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1125-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1125: Excessive Attack Surface — debug and admin routes exposed without auth.
// Vulnerable: mux registers heap dump, SQL console, and config dump endpoints.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"net/http/pprof"
	"runtime"
)

func MountWideSurfacePure(db *sql.DB) *http.ServeMux {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	mux.HandleFunc("/health", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	})
	mux.Handle("/debug/pprof/", http.HandlerFunc(pprof.Index))
	mux.HandleFunc("/admin/sql", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		sqlText := r.URL.Query().Get("q")
		rows, _ := db.Query(sqlText)
		if rows != nil {
			rows.Close()
		}
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(`[]`))
	})
	mux.HandleFunc("/admin/config", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		var m runtime.MemStats
		runtime.ReadMemStats(&m)
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		fmt.Fprintf(w, `{"heap":%d}`, m.HeapAlloc)
	})
	mux.HandleFunc("/internal/reload", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
	})
	return mux
}
